title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at CREDAI

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at CREDAI
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!
